title: Red Poppy Mugs Set of 2 Bone China 400ml Large Balmoral Floral Poppies Cups Hand Decorated UK
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL: Crafted from fine bone china with a glossy finish, these mugs feature an elegant red poppy floral design hand-decorated with ceramic transfers in the UK
GENEROUS CAPACITY: Each mug holds 400ml of your favourite hot beverage, perfect for coffee, tea, or other drinks with a comfortable handle for easy grip
SET CONTENTS: Set of 2 matching mugs featuring the stunning red poppies pattern against a crisp white background
PRACTICAL FEATURES: Lightweight yet durable construction, dishwasher safe for convenient cleaning, and reusable for everyday use
DIMENSIONS: Each mug measures 8.6 cm in diameter and 9.7 cm in height, ideal for home, office, or special occasions
description: Transform your tea and coffee moments with this exquisite set of two bone china mugs featuring a stunning red poppy design. Each 400ml capacity mug is meticulously hand-decorated with ceramic transfers in the UK with vibrant scarlet poppies and olive-green foliage against a pristine white background, creating an elegant and timeless aesthetic. The high-quality bone china construction ensures these mugs are both lightweight and durable, perfect for daily use. The generous size makes them ideal for your favourite hot beverages, whether it's your morning coffee or afternoon tea. Each mug features a comfortable handle and a glossy finish that enhances the beautiful floral pattern. These mugs are dishwasher safe, making them practical as well as beautiful. The set comes carefully packaged to ensure safe delivery. The classic poppy design adds a touch of natural beauty to any kitchen or dining setting, making them perfect for both everyday use and special occasions. These mugs would also make a thoughtful gift for anyone who appreciates fine bone china and botanical designs.
